title: Chains and ropes
description: Decorative hanging chains and ropes (catenary curve) for Minecraft Forge.
body:
# Chains & Ropes (Forge)

Decorative hanging chains and ropes (catenary curve) for Minecraft Forge.

## Features

- Place a chain/rope **between two points** (2 clicks).
- Multiple sag presets: **straight / light / medium / heavy**.
- Optional **attachments** on both ends: pick *any* item/block (cost: **2x** of the selected item/block).
- Segment decorations: right-click a segment with an item to hang **1x**; **Sneak + right-click with empty hand** removes the decoration (or breaks the whole chain if there is none).
- Simple swing physics (reacts to touches / hits), toggleable.
- You can hang objects on chains and ropes (luminous objects will emit light).

## How to use

1. Hold the desired chain/rope item (check recipes via JEI/REI or the mod datapack).
2. Right-click a block to set the **first** point.
3. Right-click the second point to open the attachment menu.
4. Confirm — the chain is placed and **consumes 1 item**.

Tips:

- **Sneak + right-click** (not a fence) clears the first point.
- **Sneak + right-click a fence** snaps to the fence post (with a small wrap around it).

## Commands (OP required)

- `/car physics on|off`
- `/car clinging_block on|off`
- `/car kill all|<type>`
- `/car create <type> <sag>` (sag 0–100)

## Versions

This repository provides Forge builds for: **1.19.4 / 1.20.1 / 1.20.4 / 1.21 / 1.21.1 / 1.21.4 / 1.21.6 / 1.21.8**.
